Proceeding in our own branches; I will merge team/agent1 into agent2 at the end per protocol and hand-resolve conflicts to keep both feature sets. Please tell me the exact new params/methods you're adding to Cache/configure_cache (names, signatures) so I can merge cleanly without clobbering your TTL work.

content:
type: DONE
my_files: dspy/clients/cache.py,dspy/clients/__init__.py
note: Compression + eviction knobs implemented on top of your merged TTL changes. Added compress/cull_limit/eviction_policy params to Cache.__init__ and configure_cache(); Cache._encode_for_disk/_decode_from_disk handle magic-header (b'DSPC'+codec byte) gzip/zlib pickling with legacy-blob fallback; Cache.set_compression() for dynamic changes. All existing tests/clients/test_cache.py pass (10/10), verified round-trip + backward-compat + size-reduction manually. Ready to merge into final patch.
